```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="text-align:center;font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;margin-bottom:0.95em;line-height:1.4;">
  Two-year shift in <span style="color:#FFB84D;font-weight:700;">where engineering effort goes</span>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 0.2fr 1fr;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:1.05em 0.9em 1.1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(86,84,162,0.1);border-top:4px solid #5654A2;">
   <div style="width:2.6em;height:2.6em;border-radius:0.6em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EEEDF8,#D6D2EF);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.55em;color:#5654A2;">
    <i data-lucide="message-circle" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;line-height:1.2;">Prompt<br>Engineering</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.5em;">Did the model<br>hear what we said?</div>
  </div>

  <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.1em;color:#9B8EA0;text-align:center;font-weight:700;">→</div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:1.05em 0.9em 1.1em;text-align:center;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border-top:4px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="width:2.6em;height:2.6em;border-radius:0.6em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FEF5E7,#FAE9C8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 0.55em;color:#C4881A;">
    <i data-lucide="book-open" style="width:1.2em;height:1.2em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.78em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;line-height:1.2;">Context<br>Engineering</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;line-height:1.45;margin-top:0.5em;">Does the model have<br>the right info?</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.85em;text-align:center;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.06em;">
  prompt ⊂ context &nbsp;·&nbsp; <span style="color:#5654A2;">containment, not replacement</span>
 </div>

</div>
```
